mapper.select: SELECT * FROM qualifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM qualifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT *, CASE WHEN expiry_date IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(expiry_date, CURDATE()) ELSE NULL END AS days_to_expiry FROM qualifications WHERE expiry_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND status != 'expired' ORDER BY expiry_date ASC

SELECT q.*, CASE WHEN q.expiry_date IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(q.expiry_date, CURDATE()) ELSE NULL END AS days_to_expiry FROM qualifications q INNER JOIN xm_person p ON q.user_id = p.id WHERE p.org_id = #{orgId} AND q.expiry_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND q.status != 'expired' ORDER BY q.expiry_date ASC
